trajectory.command:
python train.py && python -c '
import json
import shutil
from pathlib import Path
data_dir = Path("/tmp/test_data")
data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
maps_eval_dir = data_dir / "maps_eval"
maps_eval_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
types = ["room", "tunnel", "outdoor"]
copied = {}
for t in types:
    src_dir = Path("/data/maps_train") / t
    dst_dir = maps_eval_dir / t
    dst_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    if src_dir.exists():
        pngs = sorted(src_dir.glob("*.png"))[:2]
        for p in pngs:
            shutil.copy(p, dst_dir / p.name)
        copied[t] = len(pngs)
print("Copied maps per type:", copied)
# create config
maps_list = []
for t in types:
    dst_dir = maps_eval_dir / t
    if dst_dir.exists():
        pngs = sorted(dst_dir.glob("*.png"))
        for p in pngs[:2]:
            maps_list.append(f"{t}/{p.name}")
config = {"maps": maps_list}
with open(data_dir / "eval_config.json", "w") as f:
    json.dump(config, f, indent=2)
print("Eval config maps:", config["maps"])
' && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/test_data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output /tmp/output.json && cat /tmp/output.json && python -c '
import json
with open("/tmp/output.json", "r") as f:
    res = json.load(f)
print("\nSummary:")
print("Total episodes:", res.get("total_episodes"))
print("Success rate:", res.get("success_rate"))
print("Mean explored_rate:", res.get("explored_rate"))
print("Mean travel_distance (success):", res.get("travel_distance"))
print("Per type:", res.get("per_type"))
'
